<cstdio>\n#include <cctype>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <cstring>\n\nstruct Block {\n    char ch;\n    long long count;\n};\n\nBlock blocks[100000]; \nint block_count = 0;\n\nint main() {\n    char s_prime[100002];\n    fgets(s_prime, sizeof(s_prime), stdin);\n    int len = strlen(s_prime);\n    if (len > 0 && s_prime[len-1] == '\\n') {\n        s_prime[len-1] = '\\0'; \n    }\n    \n    long long c;\n    if (scanf(\"%lld\", &c) != 1) {\n        return 1;\n    }\n\n    int i = 0;\n    while (s_prime[i] != '\\0') {\n        char ch = s_prime[i];\n        i++;\n        \n        char num_str[20] = {0};\n        int num_len = 0;\n        while (s_prime[i] != '\\0' && isdigit(s_prime[i])) {\n            if (num_len < 19) num_str[num_len++] = s_prime[i];\n            i++;\n        }\n        num_str[num_len] = '\\0';\n        \n        long long cnt = strtoll(num_str, NULL, 10);\n        blocks[block_count].ch = ch;\n        blocks[block_count].count = cnt;\n        block_count++;\n    }\n    long long total = 0;\n    for (int j = 0; j < block_count; ++j) {\n        total += blocks[j].count;\n    }\n    long long k = c % total;\n    long long current = 0;\n    for (int j = 0; j < block_count; ++j) {\n        if (k < current + blocks[j].count) {\n            printf(\"%c\\n\", blocks[j].ch);\n            return 0;\n        }\n        current += blocks[j].count;\n    }\n    \n    return 1; \n}","time":21,"memory":1264,"problem":{"pid":"P11858","title":"[CCC 2025 Senior] \u7834\u8bd1 \/ Cryptogram Cracking
